name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "idle"
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Coordinator is a single process *)
Coordinator == 1

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \/ Coordinator, receiver \in Participants \/ Coordinator, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in a sequence *)
Messages == SequenceOf(Message)

(* Initial state: all participants are in the "Init" state, coordinator is in "Start" state, no messages *)
Init ==
  /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ messages = <<>>

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorPrepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ coordinator' = "PrepareSent"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Prepare]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants receive Prepare and vote yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes ==
  /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Prepare
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "Init" /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Prepare /\ msg.receiver = p
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteYes"]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  /\ messages' = messages

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and sends Commit *)
CoordinatorCommit ==
  /\ coordinator = "PrepareSent"
  /\ \A p \in Participants : \E msg \in messages : msg.type = VoteYes /\ msg.receiver = p
  /\ coordinator' = "CommitSent"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Commit]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to "Committed" *)
ParticipantCommitted ==
  /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Commit
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VoteYes" /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Commit /\ msg.receiver = p
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  /\ messages' = messages

(* Coordinator sends Abort if any participant votes no *)
CoordinatorAbort ==
  /\ coordinator = "Start"
  /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = VoteNo
  /\ coordinator' = "AbortSent"
  /\ participants' = participants
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> Abort]) \* for each participant p

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to "Aborted" *)
ParticipantAborted ==
  /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Abort
  /\ \E p \in Participants : participants[p] = "VoteYes" \/ participants[p] = "VoteNo" /\ \E msg \in messages : msg.type = Abort /\ msg.receiver = p
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
  /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  /\ messages' = messages

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ CoordinatorPrepare
  \/ ParticipantVoteYes
  \/ CoordinatorCommit
  \/ ParticipantCommitted
  \/ CoordinatorAbort
  \/ ParticipantAborted

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Start", "PrepareSent", "CommitSent", "AbortSent"}
  /\ messages \in Messages

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        \/ (states[i] = "thinking" /\ states[i] = "hungry")
        \/ (states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[NextFork(i)] = i
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![NextFork(i)] = i]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"])
        \/ (states[i] = "eating" /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![PrevFork(i)] = i]
            /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"])
        \/ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

NextFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
PrevFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue *)
Enqueue == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder for actual item *)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Enqueue \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ==
